title: Small Animated Totem ResourcePack
description: A lightweight retexture of the Totem of Undying that keeps the classic vanilla feel while improving visibility and style.
body:
# Small Animated Totem – Vanilla+

A lightweight retexture of the Totem of Undying that keeps the classic vanilla feel while improving visibility and style.

The totem is smaller and cleaner, so it doesn't eat up your screen during intense moments. There's a subtle animation added too — enough to make it feel polished without clashing with vanilla's aesthetic.

---

![Main Seen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e340feadc2c52d4428cae3e25b9792e73feb709_0.webp)

---

![Front](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vfiycYii/images/a798141e731e97406cfb3dc228205ddb4bf55d5f.png)

---

## What's changed

- Smaller totem model — less screen obstruction, better combat visibility
- Smooth idle animation — adds life without being distracting
- Vanilla-friendly design — blends naturally with default textures
- No performance impact

---

## Good fit for

- PvP players tired of the totem blocking their view
- Survival players who want a cleaner look
- Anyone going for a Vanilla+ setup

---

## Pair it with the full pack

For a complete visual overhaul, check out the full resource pack:
👉 [Yashh's Advanced Textures](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/yashh-resorcepack)

---

## Support

If you like the pack: ☕ [Buy Me a Coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/yashh_labs)

Made by **Penchi** — a follow or share goes a long way.
